rationale: In the citing paper, Savary, Goldsmith, and Dhar (2015) is cited mainly as prior evidence that choices can serve self-signaling motives. The citation appears as background support (including motivation for an alternative-process measure), not as a core basis for the entitlement theory, hypotheses, or study design. The paper does not directly build on, extend, or challenge the specific mechanisms or experimental paradigm of the cited article.
